heading: Regulations; contract terms and conditions
label: 758e–3 Regulations; contract terms and conditions
text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of sections 758e to 758e–5 of this title. Any contract entered into pursuant to shall be subject to such terms and conditions as the Secretary deems necessary and appropriate to protect the interests of the United States.section 758e of this title
